factors.summary: The company faces mixed economic conditions, with favorable trends in the U.S. and certain regions offsetting softness in developed markets. However, broader macroeconomic uncertainties, such as global economic instability and geopolitical risks, pose risks to the company's business and financial performance.

evidence.text: Our business is sensitive to general economic conditions. Slower global economic growth, actual or anticipated default on sovereign debt, changes in global trade policies, volatility in the currency and credit markets, high levels of unemployment, reduced levels of capital expenditures, changes in government fiscal and monetary policies, government deficit reduction and budget negotiation dynamics, sequestration, other austerity measures, political and social instability, and other challenges that affect the global economy adversely affect us and our distributors, customers and suppliers.
evidence.subsection: Conditions in the global economy, the markets we serve and the financial markets may adversely affect our business and financial statements.

evidence.text: Sales from existing businesses continued to increase on a year-over-year basis in the United States and to a lesser extent in Asia and Western Europe...

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: Mixed economic conditions with macroeconomic uncertainties pose risks to business performance.

factors.summary: R&D investment is increasing and ongoing, with a focus on product development to support growth initiatives.

evidence.text: R&D expenses (consisting principally of internal and contract engineering personnel costs) as a percentage of sales increased 10 basis points on a year-over-year basis in 2016 as compared to 2015. Incremental year-over-year increases in investments in our product development initiatives were the primary contributors to this increase...

Our continued investments in sales growth initiatives and new product introductions, as well as indications of stabilization in broad-based market conditions and other business-specific factors discussed below also contributed to overall sales growth during the year.
